name: computer-use-windows
description: Controlled Windows desktop automation through guarded window snapshots and input actions.

interface.shortDescription: Observe and control selected Windows app windows with approval gates.
interface.longDescription: A local high-risk Computer Use plugin for Windows. It exposes read-only window discovery and snapshot tools plus approval-gated input actions through a local stdio MCP server.

skillPreviews.name: Computer Use Windows
skillPreviews.description: Control Windows desktop apps through the guarded Computer Use Windows plugin.

mcpServers.name: Computer Use Windows
mcpServers.description: Controlled Windows desktop observation and input automation.
permissions: Can send mouse and keyboard input to selected windows after approval.

tools.name: computer_health_check
tools.title: Computer Use Health Check
tools.description: Check whether the local Windows helper is available.

tools.name: get_window
tools.title: Get Window
tools.description: Resolve a window by reference, title, or process name.

tools.name: get_window_state
tools.title: Get Window State
tools.description: Capture screenshot metadata and optional image content for a selected window.

tools.name: activate_window
tools.title: Activate Window
tools.description: Bring a selected window to the foreground.

tools.name: click
tools.title: Click
tools.description: Click inside a selected window using snapshot-relative coordinates.

tools.name: scroll
tools.title: Scroll
tools.description: Scroll inside a selected window using snapshot-relative coordinates.

tools.name: press_key
tools.title: Press Key
tools.description: Press keyboard keys or shortcuts in a selected window.

tools.name: type_text
tools.title: Type Text
tools.description: Type text into a selected window.

tools.name: drag
tools.title: Drag
tools.description: Drag inside a selected window using snapshot-relative coordinates.

installReview: This plugin can observe and interact with local desktop applications.
Input actions require approval by default.
Do not enable this plugin for untrusted projects.
